findings.location: s1 — 基本的な操作方法 paragraph
findings.description: Knowledge file states 'SQLファイルが存在しない場合は初期画面（空のファイル一覧）が表示される' but the source only says '以下のような画面が表示される' (pointing to a figure). The parenthetical description '空のファイル一覧' is not present in the source text.
findings.source_evidence: 存在しない場合は以下のような画面が表示される。 (followed by a figure directive, no text description of screen content)

findings.location: s1 — SQLExecutorでの記法 table, IN句 row
findings.description: Knowledge file includes the example '（例: `[1,2,3]`）' for IN clause format. This specific example does not appear in the source; the source uses a figure (in-success.png) to illustrate correct usage, with no textual example of comma-separated values inside brackets.
findings.source_evidence: IN句の条件を[]で囲んでいる画像 (referenced only via figure directive, no textual example provided in source)
